cms_item.title: Footer Links Block
cms_item.content:
• About us
  • Customer Service

cms_item.title: Contact us info
cms_item.content:
We love hearing from you, our Luma customers. Please contact us about anything at all. Your latest passion, unique health experience or request for a specific product. We’ll do everything we can to make your Luma experience unforgettable every time. Reach us however you like

Contact Us Info
Phone
1-800-403-8838

Call the Luma Helpline for concerns, product questions, or anything else. We’re here for you 24 hours a day - 365 days a year.

Apparel Design Inquiries

Are you an independent clothing designer? Feature your products on the Luma website! Please direct all inquiries via email to: cs@luma.com

Press Inquiries

Please direct all media inquiries via email to: pr@luma.com

cms_item.content:

Clothing shouldn’t be Shop New Yoga
You can’t have too many tees 4 tees for the price of 3. Right now Women’s Tees Hot pants

What would Erin wear? It’s no secret: see Luma founder Erin Renny’s wardrobe go-to’s Shop Erin Recommends

cms_item.title: Training Block
cms_item.content:
Motivate yourself.
Reach goals.
Boost ambition.
Max fitness.
Upgrade lifestyle. Before creating Luma, pro trainer Erin Renny helped world-class athletes reach peak fitness Hand-selected by Erin, our training downloads reflect a commitment to yoga, health and wellness. Download Training on demand Luma downloads to inspire and challenge.
Your space, your pace Videos

Top Videos

Stream free with subscription

and jump ropes Shop Fitness Here’s to you! $4 Luma water bottle

at check out

Women’s Deals Pristine prices on pants, tanks and bras. Shop Women’s Deals
Men’s Bargains Stretch your budget with active attire Shop Men’s Deals Luma Gear Steals Your best efforts deserve a deal Shop Luma Gear
20% OFF Every $200-plus purchase! Spend $50 or more — shipping is free! Buy more, save more You can't have too many tees 4 tees for the price of 3. Right now Tees on sale

cms_item.title: New Block
cms_item.content:
New Luma Yoga Collection The very latest yoga styles plus twists on timeless classics Shop New Yoga
Whatever day brings Luma Cocona™ for breathability, CoolTech™ for wicking, or a blend of both. Performance Fabrics A sense of renewal Enjoy comfort of body and mind with Luma eco-friendly choices Shop Eco Friendly

cms_item.content:
